mapper.select: SELECT FROM `project_member` WHERE `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `project_member_id`
mapper.update: UPDATE `project_member` SET `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `user_id` = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `member_role` = #{memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `responsibility` = #{responsibility, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} WHERE `project_member_id` = #{projectMemberId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
